name: Pesalai Beach
description: This place have many photographic attractions.fishing people life can b capture very nicely when someone comes here at morning times.at the evening this coastal area become more leisurely and peaceful.navy crew always there for helping people.

name: Talaimannar Beach
description: It is very nice natural beautiful place. it can be used for tourism as very highly tourist attraction place.

name: Thalvupadu Beach
description: Very beautiful beach aside small fishing village. Keeri beach also there very near to this beach.

name: Keeri Beach
description:
A nice location at the southern cost of the Mannar island. It is a nice location for a view of the beach and to play. However, the visitors there have to be more responsible.
There is a set of washrooms and and a place to change. the beach is a very nice place to visit with your family.

name: Vankalai Beach
description: Wonderful and a hidden treasure. You can calm yourself and walk along. One of the best places to see the slow waves and feel the cool wind. Village fisher men cast nets here day time. In the evening the beach is alone to spend time.

name: Silawathurei Beach
description: lack of people there, nice beach but careful from the sea bath. Navy check points situated close by, Near to Vilpattuwa temple.

name: Kinniya Beach
description: This place is popular for dryfish. Peole can buy dryfish for reasonable price from this place. Situated on the way to Muthur from Trincomalee. Loads of dryfish can be seen here which is kept for dry with the sunlight. Sitauated 18km away from Trincomalee.

name: Sampur Beach
description: Sampur is a town in the Trincomalee District of Sri Lanka and it is located about 30 km South-East of Trincomalee on the South-Eastern side of the Trincomalee Harbour. The town was under the control of LTTE until 2006, when it was liberated by Sri Lankan Armed Forces.

name: Sampoor Lighthouse
description: One of the best amazing locations with a great view point available at the sampoor area. During the Elam war period this lighthouse got attacked several times.it is a very attractive lighthouse in Sri Lanka.

name: Arisimale Beach
description: Arisimale Beach lies off the beaten track about 50 km North of Trincomalee in the town of Pulmude. In Tamil arisi means rice and malai mean mountain. Thus this is the �Mountain of Rice� in Tamil. The reason for the name is in the sand. This beach is made of extremely large particles of sand, the size of a rice seed.

name: Ilankaithurai Beach
description:
A scenic beach situated right next to famous Lankapatuna Samudragiri Viharaya.
The sacred tooth relic of Lord Buddha has been brought to Sri Lanka by Prince Dantha & Princess Hemamala and they landed in a port on this beach.
Truly beautiful.

name: Kuchchaveli beach
description: It's a wonderful hidden beach in Kuchavelli behind base hospital. Not a suitable place for swimming. If you want to enjoy early morning beach breeze and walk along green forest of casuarina trees,  it's the perfect place

name: Rathugala (Red Rock)
description: An uncongested area. There is something special about geography. There are very small sea creatures and small fish around.it's more suitable for explorers than for fun.

name: Nilaveli Beach
description: A beach that has managed to attract tourist attraction.  But it decreases during some period of the year.  Safe for bathing.  It can be reached in about 30 minutes from Trincomalee city.  Pigeon Island is also located near this beach. So many scuba diving places available here.

name: Pigeon Island Marine National Park
description: One of the best places to go snorkeling and spend a day on the beach. The sand is rough because it is made of corals but you can see the fish in their home and you can see turtles and you can even got to swim with a shark ! you can enjoyed this place so much. The sun was pretty strong so watch out.

name: Tambalagam Bay
description: What a view , best tome is to be near the lagoon to see the sunset ao better to leave marble beach around 5:30 pm and stay near the main road to see a beautiful sunset

name: Sweat Bay
description: It is one of the finest beaches in Trincomalee that has not exposed much as it belongs to the Sri Lanka Air Force. There is no any installations in the beach and fishermen are using the beach. Calm and shallow water gives ideal for a sea bath and also can feel the nature as well as sorrounded by jungle.

name: Dutch Bay Beach
description: A surprising gem of a public beach near the town centre. The cleanliness and lack of hustlers is refreshing.  If you want access to a great beach and crystal clear waters without sacrificing city conveniences - Trinco is the place for you.

name: Marble Beach
description: This is an amazing beach with nice sea view clean water. Marble beach is like a pool you can swim to far but its not too deep. The water is clean you able to see the bottom of the sea. Please when you are visit here please keep all polythin and nature harm goods with you. This is a lovely place we have a duty to protect it.

name: Elephant Point Beach
description: One of the most amazing beaches in all of Sri Lanka I ever experienced. It is located inside the navy camp. Just a 700m drive from the naval museum. Most of the visitors miss this awesome place due to less knowledge of the location. It is totally maintained by the SL Navy. The place is mostly used by Navy officers to have gatherings and small parties.The sea and the tides are calm and quiet throughout the season and in the off season. This view is mesmerizing and ships and boats are everywhere on the horizon. A must visit place.

name: Green Bay Beach
description: Green Bay Beech is a natural beach which is absoulitly a heavn. The natural beauty of the place remains same as it is not open for general public. The water on the sea looks green since the beach is covered by jungle. But water is crystal clear and clean

name: Uppuveli Beach
description: Relaxing and a peaceful beach. Parking may differ from where you enter the beach. Night time would be great for a party or just to enjoy the evening. Swimming is not suitable in all the places. You also could collect some shells and see some sea creatures if you are lucky.

name: Salli Beach
description: wow,experience was awesome at this beach. It may be a bit difficult to find your way to this beach.You gotta follow may narrow roads, but eventually when you reach this place, feeling of worth coming.

name: Trincomalee Town Beach
description: Easy access as it's situtaed in the town area. Not advicing swimming or bathing.sometimes it's bit crowded. View is good. it's clean, it can be a wonderful place to relax.

name: Public Beach Trincomalee
description: One of the iconic places in Trincomalee. A large beautiful Sea view with white and clean sand area. Best place to spend your leisure time or get relaxed. Famous for boat ride, dolphin watching, snorkeling, and some other water sports.

name: Chundikulam Beach
description: Chundikulam Beach side, near chundikulam bird Sanctuary. quite place.Beautiful Beach located in mullaitivu

name: Nayaru Beach
description: The beach is awesome and one of the best hangout place for locals. The beach is clean and you can also fishing. Please take a local with you for guidance. The view Are definitely breathtaking.

name: Old chemmalai beach
description: One of the most attractive beaches in Sri lanka.It located in mulathiv district and near to nayaaru lagoon. Four wheels can easily enter to the beach entrance. If you are interested in landscaping photography, this is the right place for that. Also, If you want bath safely, this the most suitable place in mulathiv district. you can get a better experience than other beaches. Very calm beach and it has attractive eye view.

name: Mullaitivu Beach
description: Beautiful beach place. but this place is not suitable for bathing .  Infront of the beach there is a children's Park .  Actually this is like small Harbor . It is because Sri Lankan small boat fishermen brought their fish  here and sell.  There are fish markets also.  Good for visitors early in the morning or afternoon to visit. Be aware of cows .

name: Karaiyamullivaikkal Beach
description: Very beautiful beach. You can see sunrise . It's worth to visit

name: Black Sand Beach
description: The morning view of the beach is very attractive.In the evenings you can even buy fish from the local Fisher men around that area. There is an area for you to sit on as well as a children playground. In the daytime it's extremely hot. Good place for you to enjoy the calm vibes of a sea side at night. bath from here is risk. Its much deep

name: Kaluthavalai Beach
description: The finest beach area available in the Batticaloa district. It's just 1.5 km from the main road! most likely by evenings, it turns into a play area for Elle and other games.

name: Puthukkudiyiruppu Beach
description: Super and beautiful place many people the place most beautiful.Fishing place and can get fish in the early morning

name: Kaluwanchikudy Beach
description: One of the beautiful beaches in the Batticaloa coastal area. Rough sea and you can�t swim here but can enjoy every second of it. You can witness the fish sale in the morning. Beautiful place to witness the sunrise. Slightly polluted still standing beautifully.

name: Kattankudy Beach
description: the most beautiful beach in the eastern province, come and relax with breeze, its mostly crowded in the weekends and holidays.

name: Kallady Beach
description: Kallady is one of the most popular and serene beaches on the east coast. You can reach this beach by turning left onto the 2nd road towards Akkaraipaththu end after the Kallady bridge and travelling for about 1 km. It has got some space to park vehicles and there are number of benches to sit & admire the beach. It is not a safe place to have a bath or a swim, since the slope from beach runs towards the sea. A morning walk or a run with sunrise in the background will definitely freshen up your soul.

name: Navaladi Beach
description: Lonely beach area with lesser human activities. Good place for relax and enjoy the sea.Few holiday homes available with reasonable price. public transport available from kallady.

name: Eravur Lagoon Park
description: One of the best places in Eastern province Sri Lanka to spend your free time. it's located in Eravur (Batticaloa District), when you feel want to see beautiful sunset this is the right place for you.

name: Batticaloa Lagoon Bar
description: A beautiful place in Batticaloa, one can explore the view of the lagoon side in the evening when the sun goes down and has more colors ranging from yellow, orange, and red. We can also buy lagoon fish and shrimp. Many people like the taste of this fish because the salinity of the water varies from season to season and from bar mouth to location. A lagoon tour can be done from Barmouth via Kalady Bridge with the help of a Trimmer boat to the western part of the lagoon.

name: Balameen Madu Beach
description: It's a beautiful beach full of pine trees. The beach view is very beautiful. You can cook and enjoy our Day at the beach. You can bathe here, but have to be careful.

name: Punnakuda Beach
description: Punnakuda Beach is very famous in Batticaloa. many families visit it during their free time. Early risers can enjoy gorgeous sunrises. They can also meet the fishermen and help them pull the net out of the water. Located in Batticaloa District, Eastern Province, and is about 15 km northwest of Batticaloa.

name: Nasuvantivu Beach
description: A very beautiful beach. full of coconut groves on the shore. Most local people visit this place and fewer tourists do. From here you can visually see the elephant rock in Pasikudah.

name: Koddaikallar
description: A place to enjoy the natural wind from the eastern coast of Sri Lanka. This area is called the place where fish sings. It has been told that the tone of the fish will be able to be observed in this lagoon during a certain season of the year. An amazing place for nature and photography lovers.

name: Kaluvankerny Beach
description: A beautiful long white sand beach, blue sea, and a few coconut trees with nice relaxing places. Few fishermen can be seen there. you can see feel-good energy here.

name: Jinna Beach
description: One of the most beautiful beaches in Batticaloa around. Really nice and calm place to enjoy with family and friends. Also, You can bathe in the sea here.

name: Kalkudah Beach
description: Kalkudah Bay and Kalkudah beach are very nice places. Good for sea bathing and more people are traveling to Kalkudah due to the amazing wide shore. The beach is clean and clear. Perfect to relax and enjoy.

name: Elephant Rock Beach
description: The Elephant Rock is a beautiful, semi-private beach in Pasikuda, distinguished by a tiny elephant-shaped rock and with plenty of coastline to relax on, unlike much of Pasikuda these days. Pasikuda Bay is noted for its calm, wave-free waters, and Elephant Rock is a great place to relax on the beach.

name: Pasikuda Beach
description: One of the most important and beautiful beaches in Sri Lanka is Pasikudah, a very safe beach, and the waves are very short so people who come here can bathe without fear.

name: Kayankerni Coral Reef
description: This place has a massive treasure under the sea.There are several ornamental marine fauna and flora.

name: Sallitheevu Beach
description: This place is in the District of Batticaloa in Eastern Province. It's one of the most popular tourist destinations for tourists.

name: Akkarai Beach
description: One of the best beaches in Sri Lanka and a must visit place during your visit to Jaffna. Unlike many beaches in the country, it's a really safe place for small kids since there are no waves.

name: Moorkkam Beach
description: One of the best beaches in Sri Lanka and a must visit place during your visit to Jaffna. Unlike many beaches in the country, it's a really safe place for small kids since there are no waves.

name: Manatkaadu Beach
description: A beach with soft white sand and without impurities. Beach is not polluted and small sand hills are also available here. Lot of pine trees are grown near the beach area and its like a pine forest.

name: Kudaththanai Beach
description: Nice sand hills to play. Soft white sand is a great sight to see and play with kids.

name: Nagarkovil Beach
description: Calm and peaceful beach with no outsiders. Only the fishermen live here.

name: Uduththurai Fishing Beach
description: Uduthurai beach is located in Jaffna district. Mostly there are so many fisher men, going to work in morning and evening. This beach suitable for bath. Don't go to the deep. Morning and evening beach view is always amazing

name: Kankesanthurai Beach
description: A beautiful place, specially in evening. A snack shop is located inside. You can bath in the sea as well. A light house is located nearby.

name: Kayts Island Fort
description: Amazing photographic place. Beauty of the place enhanced by the ruins of fort.

name: Chaddy Beach
description: This is a beach situated in the southern part of the Jaffna peninsula and is not very popular as Casuarina Beach. It is a safe beach to have a bath and not very crowded. Has additional facilities such as fresh water showers, changing rooms and wash rooms. Best time to visit is either early in the morning or late evening.

name: Natural Pool Thalpe
description:
According to the villagers the rock pools were cut out of the corals around 50 years ago and was used to soak coconut husks in order to separate the coconut coir.
rock pool beach best time to visit is early morning from March to April.

name: Mihiripenna Beach
description: One of the very safe beaches to bathe in Sri Lanka. There is a sea pool without waves and deep areas. This beach is narrow and there are hotels and restaurants along the beach.

name: Akurala Beach
description: Very safe place for sea bathing and sunbathing.  Surrounded by small coral reefs, Atmosphere of the beach feels like a natural pool. If you reach there at the evening you can see full marvelous sunset over there.

name: Palatupana Beach
description: One of the best breathtaking view in Sri Lankan beaches. Even though the place is wonderful, it is not good to have a sea bath. Please do not put garbage here.

name: Kirinda Beach
description: Kirinda is a 3km long sandy beach in the south of Sri Lanka located near a fisherman village of the same name near a Buddhist stupa. High waves and picturesque reefs attract extreme surfing and underwater swimming enthusiasts here. The beautiful beach covered in light golden sand and giant boulders on the coast is also a great place for unique photo shoots and long walks along the shoreline.

name: Hambantota Beach
description: Hambantota beach is a scenic area. Ample parking available as well. However it is highly recommended not to get in to the sea for bathing. The tides are very strong. However no merchants can be seen around this area as you would see in beaches in Colombo and Galle. However on Sundays, local vendors get together and sell their produce in the beach.

name: Godawaya beach
description:
A clam beach with a small fishing harbor. Quite nice in the morning because the sailors are coming back from the sea.
But be careful when swimming here as the water is unpredictable and always get an advice from a villager first.

name: Kochchama
description: This beach is awesome. never see that kind of red colour on the beach. Can go with children. If you going to bath choose the middle area side of coral reef. Don't go on the reef for photographs or selfless. It would be dangerous. No words to explain the beauty of the beach.

name: Ussangoda Beach
description: Very ancient scenic Beach. Very beautiful location near nonagama town. Location can accessible via vehicle. Very nice environment. Beach is very suitable for bathing. The ussangoda hill located near the beach is very popular among local travelers. Getting crowded during weekends.

name: Rekawa Beach
description: Beautiful beach. It�s so quiet, you would feel you�re the only one in the the whole beach and world. love this kind of environment. So if you like no parties and natural area, this is the place for you.

name: Tangalle Beach
description: Tangalla beach is also most attractive beach among local and foreign tourist. A coral reef has distributed along the coastal area and as well as rocky shore. Crystal clear water force everyone to swim and snorkeling. It is safe here to swim. A lifesaving team give attention 24 hours. Washroom facilities are available with freshwater. Restaurants, hotels, and parking facilities are available here (It costs LKR 100 per hour for parking). Tangalla harbour is located about 100 m away from the beach.

name: Parewella Natural Swimming Area
description:
The beach is really great for a swim. The area is like a natural swimming pool and the waves are less making it ideal for swimming.
The beach is relatively less polluted and there is a public toilet as well as a place to change clothes for which they charge a reasonable amount.

name: Goyambokka Beach
description: The beach is very beautiful with several restaurants, clean,it is also not noisy, you can reach the sea and relax, the landscape is very beautiful in addition to the beach is small, there also rent chairs to enjoy or  Protect yourself from the sun, all that at the best time of the year, which are the months of December, January, February and March.

name: Silent Beach
description: One of the nicest beaches you must visit in Sri Lanka. Not crowded at all and the waves are really powerful. You can relax in the shadows of the palms.

name: Mawella Beach Hideaways
description: Nice place to spend the evening and morning. Fishermen are doing their job everyday.located by Kurumba , MAWELLA and Tangalle.

name: Hummanaya Blow Hole
description:
This is a beautiful place to witness the fascinating natural blow hole.They take a ticket at the entrance to the blow hole.
There is a small track to walk to reach the blow hole. On the way there are small businesses which are run by the residents of the houses of the road sides where they sell dried fish and fried fish etc for reasonable prices. They even have ice cream shops etc.
On the way there is this beach area which is unpolluted and so beautiful. There were lots of crabs, sea urchins and sea animals there.

name: Kudawella Beach
description: Best beach in the Tangalle area to catch some waves and go surfing.if you are just getting started.If you are super lucky, you may even experience baby turtles hatching!

name: Thalawila Beach
description: Best beach in the Tangalle area to catch some waves and go surfing.if you are just getting started.If you are super lucky, you may even experience baby turtles hatching!

name: Uchchimuni beach
description:
It is possible to have a fun off-road experience with the beautiful view on both sides of the very difficult 21km road from Kudawa to Uchchimuni beach.  
If you also want to try the experience, definitely get someone who has a good experience with the roads while traveling.

name: Baththalangunduwa
description: is a small island off the coast of Kalpitiya in the Puttalam District of the North Western Province of Sri Lanka. There are 14 islands. Baththalangunduwa is the second-largest island after Uchchimune and Mohontuwara. Baththalangunduwa Island covers an area of 145.53 hectares. Baththalangunduwa has located about 30.3 km from the mainland.

name: Kudiramalai
description:
Situated along the North-Western border of Willpattu National Park in Sri Lanka, Kudiramalai holds a high geological and historical importance. This is one of the popular stops in a typical Wilpattu safari. Kudiramalai is located around 5� km away from the Puttalam-Mannar B379 Road.
Kudiramalai Hill which is located around 200m before the shoreline, is a place where you can easily witness the copper-coloured sand, unique to Kudiramalai area.

name: Kappalady Kite Lagoon
description: The cleanest beach in Kalpitiya, great flatwater lagoon. Super Kitespot, great for Kayaking and SUP.

name: Mangrove Beach
description: One of the best beaches in Puttalam to spend some quality time.

name: Iranawila Beach
description: This beach is located in village called Iranawila . It�s away around 10 kms from Chilaw town, the road is not good in some places but it�s beautiful path. When compared to Chilaw beach it�s very calm and sandy clear one with no stones. If you walk few hundred meters you�ll see coconut tress surroundings

name: Chilaw Beach Park
description:
It is very nice place to spend your free times with your family and friends.There are some street food stalls and you can try them.Very delicious.You can get experience going a pony ride.
It is better to go there in the morning or evening as you can watch beautiful sun rising and sun setting.Very calm place.

name: Muthupanthiya beach
description: Another beautiful beach is in the Puttalam district of North Western Province of Sri Lanka.  It is about 4km from Colombo-Puttalam main road and Anawilundawa Bird Sanctuary is about 2km from here.

name: Katukurunda Beach
description: This Beach clear and clean. beautiful scenery. very clam place. quite and peaceful place.Not very crowded at all you can find your self lucky if you found this place.

name: Kalutara Beach
description: Kalutara beach is a long stretch of a golden shore spreading from Waskaduwa to Payagala. Divided by the Kalu river estuary, it has a charm of Its own and certain dark hue in the sand around the estuary. Being in proximity to Colombo makes it a viable candidate for a day trip to enjoy along with the cultural and religious attractions in the area.

name: Wadduwa Beach
description: Best peaceful beach to visit in Kalutara district. Very unpopular with crowds but have the most beautiful beach for miles and not many around to disturb you is a big plus. Doesn't have many shops and vendors around here but have many big hotels facing it. Best place to experience a peace and quiet sunset.

name: Browns Beach, Negombo
description: The view over Negombo beach is wonderful. It is a wide beach, brown, used by tourists and locals alike. Evening walks along the beach were so peaceful. Beach is well cleaned. The sunset over the sea from Negombo beach is well worth seeing.don't pollute the beach please protect it.

name: Thoduwawa fishing beach
description: Nice Beach for relax. Not busy. Fishing using "Ma Dhela"

name: Puttalam Beach Park
description: Nice place to take a rest. Evening time would be better than the other times. Its able to see the norochchole power station and few wind power stations. Well maintained place. Enough space for big crowd of people. Vehicle can park here. In the day time its very hot out here. Only few benches with a shelter. I must say that this is a perfect place to taste an ice cream or some fruits.

name: Colombo Face
description: A beautiful beach park. Fantastic scenery. Can see the entire Puttlam lagoon, Kalpitiya area and Norochchole power plant.

name: Morawala Beach
description: Morawala Beach Negombo is a popular attraction for residents and tourists alike. Many parents find the natural reefs forming a protective barrier a little way into the water allows their children to swim safely in this area. The rocks which separate the beach from the road are also appealing because they form a natural seat for anyone who wishes to just sit and gaze at the ocean.

name: Dungalpitiya Beach
description: Nice beach to relax and calm your mind. Plenty of shore is present here and clean too. You can get to the beach from anywhere like through small lanes as it stretches far.

name: Bopitiya Beach
description: Beautiful to spend a morning jogging or an evening walk with your loving ones. Less crowd normally. There is no any shop to buy anything around the beach but you can find them from the main street with more Hotels  by side the beach. You can get a best view of Colombo City and the Sea with good wind and having a nice day end before dinner. Keep clean

name: Uswetakeiyawa Beach
description: Besama/ Uswatakeiyawa beach is a beautiful beach. It has these natural pools which are great to have a swim. But be careful of the sea urchins. It used have so much biodiversity, it's a great place to see the sunset.

name: Preethipura Beach
description: Very good place to bring all family members. Ample parking space with free of charges. No any disturbance from beach boys. Safe place to take a sea bath. Everything is perfect. Good view of Colombo port development activities.

name: Okanda Beach
description: Situated on the Kumana safari park closed by Okanda Devalaya is believed to be the location God Skanda first sailed into Sri Lanka in a golden boat. The boat, which was turned into a rock, still stands on the Okanda beach known to all as the �Ran Oru Gala�. This is calm and clean beach where can observe few fishing activities. Please keep the place clean if you visit there.

name: Nintavur Beach
description: Best Place to See Sun Rise. You can relax here and some street foods also available.

name: Oluvil Beach
description: Oluvil Hawayana Beach is a Tourist attraction located in Oluvil. It is one of the best Tourist attractions in Sri Lanka. Address of Oluvil Hawayana Beach is Unnamed Road, Oluvil, Sri Lanka. Such a nice place to visit.

name: Sangamankanda Point
description:
Sangamankanda is the most Eastern point in Sri Lanka, where the beaches are still unsullied and as wide as 100 meters.
Lighthouse at this Eastern corner of Sri Lanka has been built in 1947 with a height of 25feet but was destroyed during the 2004 tsunami and only a 15feet of the light house now remains.

name: Panama Beach
description: One of the best places in south Eastern of Srilanka. best place for beach tents. Climbing rocks around the beach. Lots for abandoned buildings around this area. Those buildings are affected by Tsunami. 3km travel from the city. Calm place. Best place for watching sunrise. It was wonderful beach camping experience.

name: Arugam Bay Beach
description:
It was nice and scenic beach and good beach for surfing. There are many restaurants near by beach. Good place to get party vibe and enjoy the weekend.
If you traveling from Colombo, you can travel by bus to Pottuvil and reach here or take train to Batticalo and from Batti you can travel by bus. Also you can travel from down south.

name: Palamunai Beach
description:
This is the largest beach in this area with around 250 m sand distance, which is nearly 2 km from the main street with complete straight carpet road.the beach deserves watching at least one time on your way passing through Palamunai.
it has a nice view of harbour on the left side and has a good children park . plus it has a stage facing towards the sea, some special meetings and functions have been taken place.

name: Maruthamunai Beach
description: Maruthamunai Is a Beautiful Village In Ampara District, Srilanka.One of the best places to visit in Maruthamunai is Beach.Nothing can be better than spending a day at the beach.It is a beautiful beach and must be there on your list while you are planning a Visit to Maruthamunai.

name: Kudawa Beach
description: This is an ideal place for beach camping with plenty of space and shallow water. Kudawa beach is very famous among both local and foreign kite surfers. If you are willing to go kite surfing, make sure to plan your trip during the relevant season of the year. Sea can be deep in some places. Therefore, be careful and contact local fishermen or villages before you step into the water. The beach is nearly 2km away from the main road ( Kandakuliya Rd ). The beach and the surrounding is  clean and please be responsible to leave it as it is.

name: Talalla Beach
description: loved this beach. Sea is a bit hard for to swim, really strong waves but beach part amazing for hang out. All beach is almost empty. Sand is so soft and great for sunbath. Also there is small and very nice restaurant, you can eat fresh fish in that lovely place.

name: Seethagalla Beach
description: Beautiful place to spend a holiday. Not far from matara town and located just few meters from main road. Has free parking.

name: Hiriketiya Beach
description: Hiriketiya really is a lovely little beach & surfing spot for beginners as well as good place to have swim. Not very deep and also not very shallow.  Bit busy beach area in the tourist season.

name: Dickwella Beach
description: The large gold beach at south, famous city call Dickwella,  clear blue ocean, coconut trees, nice restaurant, and very silent beach, laying on sandy beach relaxing you time best time at sunset, Dickwella beach also very good for some points and secret places very clean and clearly surrounding specially do for beach yoga and meditation as my personal experience it the best for do suryanamaskara.

name: Hummana Beach Dondra
description: A beautiful beach which shows Lighthouse from a different angle. And also this is a small fishing harbor. A vantage point to take beautiful photos.

name: The Swinging Chair
description: This place has nice view. You can find it near the main road. You don�t need to pay anyone. It�s nice place to relaxing. You take nice capture taprobane island and weligama bay. You can see it near the galle to matara main road. and parking also there. no need to pay anyone. have small shop there.

name: Weligama Beach
description: Good place for surfing and sea bath. Sea is shallow and upto around 100m distance from the shore depth is less than 5ft. Avoid monsoon rain season as sea can get extremely rough. Surfing board rental places and surfing trainers are available.

name: Matara Paravi Duwa Beach
description: Such a nice beach next to the matara bus stand. Very easy to access . Evening time is the ideal time for visit this beach with your lovers. Stunning horizon, sunset and magnificent view.

name: Sk Town Beach
description:
This is one of the best place tourist attraction in down south. If you have any stress this is the place you can visit to relax your mind with cool atmosphere. Walking , seeing surrounding make me happy and relax .
Enjoy this moment and don't pollute this place

name: Matara Beach
description: A very beautiful place.  A good place to be free.  Can be without any trouble.  Family can come to have fun.  It is very convenient to find transportation facilities nearby.  Please help to protect the environment.

name: Madiha Beach
description: This is another beautiful place in southern province. It very close to the polhena beach. This place is very photogenic and good enough to play beach games, swimming,  bathing, and spend your leisure time very effectively ..

name: Polhena Beach
description: One of great beach in the southern coast of Sri lanka. Shallow water invites visitors for a sea bath. Sandy clean beach is worthy staying.

name: Matara Beach Park
description: Nice sunset view point, largest beach with car park, kids playing space, and large space for any kind of games you can enjoy your evening with family or friends and with your love or relaxing, front of the beach having some restaurant and street foods.

name: Hikkaduwa Beach
description: Beautiful beach with many activities to do. Snorkeling, Diving, Whale watching and many more.

name: Koggala Beach
description: Koggala is a best beach to relax and enjoy many amenities. Visitors can enjoy the sandy beach sparkles and sunshine pours in gold by feeling the amazing beauty of the beach and it�s surroundings.

name: Dalawella Beach
description: Dalawella beach located on the Galle coast is now a famous beach in the world because of Instagram photos. Many foreign tourists who visit South Lak climb Vijaya Rock and take a picture here.

name: Thalpe Beach
description: The tanks at Talpe Beach are one of the most popular beaches close to Galle. The sound of the waves from the sea is much better to hear and a pleasant view of the waves makes the spirit relax.

name: Rumassala Sanctuary and Jungle Beach
description: Rumassala sanctuary is a popular tourist destination located in Galle, Srilanka. Coral Reef of Bonavista is a paradise for snorkeling & diving. The sanctuary is a botanical paradise with rare plants and medicinal herbs, endemic species of birds as well as fish & coral reef. It is located surrounding the legendary Rumassala hill which is connected with the epic �Ramayana�. Rumassala is believed to be a part of Himalayas.

name: Boossa Beach
description: A beautiful beach where you can spend a very peaceful time with your family. It is best to visit the beach in the evening, where you can see the sunset very clearly. It was wonderful to see the sun spreading the most beautiful colors all over the evening sky of the Southern Coast of Sri Lanka.

name: Mount Lavinia Beach
description: One of great beach in the southern coast of Sri lanka. Shallow water invites visitors for a sea bath. Sandy clean beach is worthy staying.

name: Galle Face Green
description:
The Galle Face Green in Sri Lanka is a five-hectare ocean-side urban park, which stretches for a half kilometer along the coast. This area is now considered the largest open space in Colombo and one of the main highlights of the city. It is an extremely popular destination for many people including children, vendors, teenagers, lovers, kite flyers, merrymakers and all those who want to indulge in their favorite pastimes next to the sea under the open sky. 

The area was initially put to plan and laid out in 1859 by Governor Sir Henry George Ward, although the original Galle Face Green extended over a much larger area than is seen today.
